programme.title: E61 - Caen (Best-Of)
programme.desc: The best moments of the show in Caen.

programme.title: E20 - Sarah Lavoine/Camellia/Petit Bateau/Tartan
programme.desc: After interior design, beautiful shops and furnishings, Sarah Lavoine has launched a clothing collection. All there is to know about the camellia, the emblematic flower of Chanel. For 130 years, the Petit Bateau brand has established itself with force and tenderness. Dare the square, or how to wear tartan.

programme.title: E61 - Caen (Best-Of)
programme.desc: The best moments of the show in Caen.

programme.title: E5 - The Spirit Of The Letter/Dna In The Waterworks
programme.desc: The art of calligraphy has found a devoted defender in Jean-Sebastien. This monk from Fribourg harmoniously blends prayer, artistic creation and contemplative immersion in the silence of Einsiedeln Abbey. Tristan Favre, a young plumber, prepares to take over the family business from his mother Nicole Wolff, Geneva's first woman plumber.

programme.title: E21 - Ulgador/The Hermes Birkin Bag/French Linen/Black And White
programme.desc: Gabor and Rahel, founders of Ulgador and designers of gilded decorative items, join forces and expertise with Aude Taon, textile designer. An in-depth look at an emblematic Hermes creation, the Birkin bag. Behind the scenes of French linen production. The star of colour combinations: how to wear black and white.

programme.title: E112
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E9 - Shopping When You Are Visually Impaired?
programme.desc: Visually impaired individuals often encounter difficulties shopping, even online. Websites and stores are far too often poorly adapted to their condition. Also covered: antibiotics and farm animals; orange juice; ravioli for dessert.

programme.title: E5 - The Spirit Of The Letter/Dna In The Waterworks
programme.desc: The art of calligraphy has found a devoted defender in Jean-Sebastien. This monk from Fribourg harmoniously blends prayer, artistic creation and contemplative immersion in the silence of Einsiedeln Abbey. Tristan Favre, a young plumber, prepares to take over the family business from his mother Nicole Wolff, Geneva's first woman plumber.

programme.title: E11 - Pilot Of Le Havre
programme.desc: Le Havre is France's leading port for container ship navigation. Each day, around thirty international cargo vessels pass through it. At the heart of this traffic lies a unique profession: that of maritime pilot. He ensures the safety, arrival and departure of these giants of the seas.

programme.title: E6 - Sara Oswald/Freedom To Not Consume
programme.desc: Sara Oswald, a professional musician, travels through Switzerland to put on concerts. Her cello never leaves her side, even during her mountain skiing or hiking trips. Laurent Cocquio, a bicycle repairman in Geneva, advocates repair and recycling rather than unbridled consumption.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: TV Patrol Global Edition
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: Always Be My Maybe
programme.desc: Two heartbroken strangers, Jake and Tintin, meet after failed relationships and form a friendship that helps them heal. As they support each other in moving on, they unexpectedly find themselves falling in love.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Musical Mystery

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. The Truth or Fake is a short program designed to alert everyone to the dangers of fake news. The hosts emphasize that media literacy is a key part of the broad fight against disinformation.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Tendance XXI S12
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: 64' Actu:2025-2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: E2 - Squab With Morels
programme.desc: In Croisilles, Calvados, David Gallienne meets Francois, who raises racing pigeons for speed competitions. Later, with Charly, he prepares a local specialty: squab with morels and cider.

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: The year is 1995. Mangya, a northwestern border town of China has become a ghost town since the once-prosperous mine and border trades shut down. The town has become an island, isolated from the outside world. There is only one police station with three police officers and one gun. XIA Ran, a retired soldier has spent over a decade here. There's a saying that he's the last survivor of the battlefield but he never talk about his story. Sandstorms hit the town once a year, and a catastrophic, once-in-decade sandstorm is forecasted for this year. The storm looms on the horizon; the final transport out of town has long left. In the dead of night, five corpses are tossed into the oil tank in the town's sole gas station. The piercing silence is interrupted by a pack of uninvited guests. However, what frightens XIA Ran more than the murders is that the gas station's tank has been emptied and the town's phone line has been severed. As the sandstorm closes in on Mangya, he realizes th

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.title: Tales From The Occult
programme.desc: “Dead Mall” - Wilson runs a popular Youtube channel that offers investment tips. While hosting a livestream that introduces a brand-new shopping mall for potential entrepreneurs, he is confronted by Garuda, an influencer who specializes in exposes. Meanwhile, a mysterious masked avenger also roams the halls of the mall, setting the scene for a shocking reveal about a terrifying incident that happened before the mall's renovation. “The Tenement” - On the stairwell of a tenement building, a soaked mystery figure in a raincoat is blocking the exit. As it slowly creeps upstairs, the building's remaining residents suspect that it's the spirit of a drowning victim. A bold but cautious novelist and her fellow residents turn to Frank Ho, a notorious former triad assassin living on the 5th floor, for help. Under Frank's leadership, the residents start an unusual defense against the ghost on the stairs. “The Chink” - Young pop star Yoyi moves into a new home to have more time with her

programme.title: The Confidence Man JP: Episode of the Hero
programme.desc: The “Third Generation Tsuchinoko” -- the master con man hailed as a “hero” has died. Dako, Boku-chan and Richard all honed their skills under his tutelage. The title of 'Tsuchinoko' is handed down in secrecy to the Confidence Man (scammer) with the greatest skill, setting the stage for a showdown between his three star pupils. The contest will take place in the world heritage city of Valletta, Malta, an international gathering place for the rich and famous.Their target is the invaluable ancient Greek sculpture “Dancing Venus”, currently owned by a wealthy, retired Spanish gangster. Each scammer adopts a unique strategy in pursuit of the target, but the police and Interpol are also hot on their heels. Who will laugh last?! No one knows how the biggest scam in history will end! Who is the true 'hero' and what is the ultimate 'truth'? The last con game, grand finale, Battle Royale...begins now!

E6 - 高瀚宇滑跪小孩哥
programme.desc: 30組新銳潮玩設計師帶著自己的原創IP，與高瀚宇、何廣智、賴美雲、謝可寅、周揚青、周震南組成3組潮玩工作室，經歷一系列主題創作，在創意與設計中不斷挑戰自我、團結協作，用繪畫表達語言，賦予這些潮流新興IP更具生命力的藝術價值，也讓更多「隱藏款」原創IP和寶藏設計師被看到。

programme.title: E12 - 范丞丞神總結節目調性
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E12 - 范丞丞神總結節目調性
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: E2 - HurtCamp
programme.desc: After online qualifiers six male and female athletes take on the last test to claim their spot on Team S4H, that test is HurtCamp.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Turkey, Ramps & Fiddleheads
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the challenge of turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leaks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: E2 - HurtCamp
programme.desc: After online qualifiers six male and female athletes take on the last test to claim their spot on Team S4H, that test is HurtCamp.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Turkey, Ramps & Fiddleheads
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the challenge of turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leaks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: E8 - Indonesia
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish explore Indonesia in a fiery way. The duo test out their manhoods with leech therapy, wall jumping, participating in a traditional whip dance, and trying the ancient martial art of debus. They then slow down for a moment to stop and smell the Indonesian fruit durian and cut one out of a tree to taste test. Finally their Indonesian adventure ends with a game of flaming soccer in the streets and sulfur mining in the mouth of a volcano. With all of these wild and dangerous activities, can Rooftop and Catfish handle the heat of Indonesia?

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E2 - Feral Hogs
programme.desc: The feral hog is one of the most formidable species on the planet. Possessing a unique combination of high reproductive capacity, size, and adaptability, the feral hog absolutely decimates entire ecosystems. With pork chops on his mind, Yia travels to the Florida/Alabama border to join Jennifer Bearden and Zack Franks who are doing their part to help control the rampant feral hog population menacing Florida.

programme.title: E9 - L.A. Unplugged
programme.desc: A technology addicted mother and daughter need Bear’s help to unplug from the world of social media and experience life through the great outdoors. During their journey, Stacy and Zoe reconnect with each other and share an adventure worth posting about online.

programme.title: E10 - Southern Discomfort
programme.desc: An inner-city youth mentor, who is scared of the wild, joins Bear Grylls for an adventure outside his comfort zone. Brandon’s mission is to face his fears and inspire kids in his community.

programme.title: E7 - Victoria: The Southern Melting Pot
programme.desc: Sara goes to Melbourne to explore the food culture and find the best local ingredients. First stop, the Queen Victoria Market.

programme.title: E8 - Indonesia
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish explore Indonesia in a fiery way. The duo test out their manhoods with leech therapy, wall jumping, participating in a traditional whip dance, and trying the ancient martial art of debus. They then slow down for a moment to stop and smell the Indonesian fruit durian and cut one out of a tree to taste test. Finally their Indonesian adventure ends with a game of flaming soccer in the streets and sulfur mining in the mouth of a volcano. With all of these wild and dangerous activities, can Rooftop and Catfish handle the heat of Indonesia?

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E7 - Victoria: The Southern Melting Pot

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: Total Siyapaa
programme.desc: Aman, a Pakistani man living in London, falls in love with Asha, an Indian woman. But he must convince her parents to let them get married, despite their different nationalities. programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today's Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America's post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.desc: SHIKO is brought up in a Japanese underworld family but lives with her mother in England after her parents' separation while her elder brother TARO stays with her father BUTA. In a business trip to Paris, SHIKO meets a Chinese illegal immigrant CHIN-SHUI who can only earn his living by working for the Chinatown triads. The stepping in of SHIKO brings a tremendous change to his life. After the assassination for the triads in Paris, CHIN-SHUI flees to England and stays with his Chinese friend, FA-CHIN, who always loves SHIKO. Both SHIKO and CHIN-SHUI fall in love. The company that SHIKO works for is owned by her father BUTA. Both BUTA and TARO discovers NAKAMURI's corrupt practices in their company...

programme.title: Project A
programme.desc: This is Hong Kong at the turn of the century. The South China Sea is crawling with smugglers, cut-throats and pirates and none is more successful than the gang led by the notorious pirate Lo. Government forces invariably lose to Lo. Finally the Government looks the other way whenever Lo is around. Young seaman Jackie Chan, so far better known for his bar room fights, resigns from the Marine Force. He plans to stage a personal vendetta against Lo. Jackie gets the help of Samo Hung, little knowing Samo has his own axe to grind. Jackie and Samo suffer an inglorious drubbing in the hands of Lo. Jackie, now completely incensed, decides to don the uniform once again. He finds young commander Yuen Biao sympathetic to his cause but adamant against his antics...

programme.title: The Banquet
programme.desc: “The Banquet” assembled star-studded cast that aimed for charity to support disaster relief efforts at that time. Adapted from the 1959 Cantonese film of the same name and co-directed by Tsui Hark, Clifton Ko, Joe Cheung, and Alfred Cheung, the film tells the story of a greedy couple deceiving their estranged father to secure a huge amount business deal with oil producing country. While they pretend to welcome the father into their home and prepare a birthday banquet for him, rival also throws a competing banquet...With continuous top-star cameos offering countless surprises and laughs, this film remains remarkable, entertaining and meaningful to audience nowadays.

programme.title: The Heroic Trio
programme.desc: The evil minions of an ancient eunuch are stealing baby boys from their hospital cribs. The only hope to save the city is in the hands of The Heroic Trio.

programme.title: E1511
programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: E1 - Battle Lines
programme.desc: As the dry season approaches, tensions rise on Lemur Island, both between rival gangs and within their own ranks. Get a view from the battlefield as the female leaders fiercely defend their turf, while their newborn infants cling to them for safety.

programme.title: E1 - Battle Lines
programme.desc: As the dry season approaches, tensions rise on Lemur Island, both between rival gangs and within their own ranks. Get a view from the battlefield as the female leaders fiercely defend their turf, while their newborn infants cling to them for safety.

programme.title: E3 - Punks on the Run
programme.desc: The lions of the Nomad pride rampage deep into the heart of the MK pride’s territory, scattering its members and coming dangerously close to the five new MK cubs. Meanwhile, the Hollywoods are recovering, and Ava’s survival skills are still intact.

programme.title: E1 - A Capuchin’s Tale
programme.desc: Growing up in the rainforests in the heart of Colombia, a young capuchin monkey has to master his climbing skills, learn how to find food and learn to distinguish friend from foe.

programme.title: E4 - Victor Goes Wild
programme.desc: Experience the joys of rain and climbing with Yasmine and Yara, and watch Winston take a dip in his new pool. Go hunting for dropped radio collars with Roger and Steve, then see what happens when the two groups of summer cubs come face-to-face.

programme.title: E1 - A Capuchin’s Tale
programme.desc: Growing up in the rainforests in the heart of Colombia, a young capuchin monkey has to master his climbing skills, learn how to find food and learn to distinguish friend from foe.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. A rhythm drives all animals as they journey in search of what they need to survive, and each must decide where and when to move if they’re to succeed... These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: E1 - Big Move
programme.desc: The Lilayi Elephant Nursery near Lusaka in Zambia is home to four orphan elephants. The two oldest, four-year- olds Musolole and Zambezi, have been here since they were just a few months old. These boisterous babies are out-growing the nursery and it’s time to move to big school. Two hundred miles away, in the heart of Kafue National Park, lies elephant heaven - Camp Phoenix, the project’s release facility, where older orphans are already adapting to life in the wild.

programme.title: E2 - Hat Fuss
programme.desc: Scarf Lady needs some inspiration so Sarah takes her to the Hat Museum.

programme.title: E3 - Bubbles
programme.desc: Stanley cleans Cynthia's bus, but each time he does it keeps getting dirty again. It's so dirty by the end, he invents a super-duper cleaning machine that makes a sea of bubbles.

programme.title: E2 - House
programme.desc: Myrtle's aunt Cressy is coming to stay, and she needs Stanley to make her a bed for her. This escalates into Stanley building her a whole set of rooms outside Myrtles actual house.

programme.title: E18 - The History Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels get an interactive history lesson from Duggee and a host of famous faces.

programme.title: E16 - Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: E17 - Three Peas In A Pod
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team face a trio of Evil Peas when Mummy Pea and Daddy Pea come to visit Evil Pea. They vow to help her take over the supermarket once and for all.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E17 - Calypso
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: E36 - Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E11 - Andy And The Elephant Shrew
programme.desc: Mr Hammond has asked Andy to give a talk about elephant shrews. Andy heads to the African Savannah to find the tiny creature.

programme.title: E44 - The Comedy Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels go to see what Duggee is doing but on the way Tag stumbles on some toy blocks and hurts his knee. How can they make him feel better? Happy's mum says laughter is the best medicine.

programme.title: E43 - The Looking After Badge
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.title: E3 - Monteverde Cloud Forest, Costa Rica
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save a rare bird's nest and find a lost trophy?

programme.desc: When Kenji hears that he must travel home to Japan alone, he gets scared and tries to hide. So, Thomas sets out to find him

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: Famous mystery writer Victoria Rollins is presumed dead until her social-media page announces her new novel. But when a fan tries to confirm the author's existence, she's flung into a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: E10 - Pickleball Promise
programme.desc: A busy Theresa is desperate to plan a girls' night with her besties. While at lunch, Spirit pulls Theresa into a reading that finds a departed mom asking her daughter's boyfriend for a proposal!

programme.title: E60 - Beef Fajitas And Bean Dip Nachos
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a fun and delicious beef fajita dinner cooked a la plancha. The beef is marinated in a spicy sauce, served on charred tortillas and accompanied by a platter of bean-dip nachos.

programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: E391 - Carnival Cash Out
programme.desc: Mike and Jersey go hog wild for a four-generation carny collection complete with carousel horses, toy tanks, and bumper cars. Down the road in New Hampshire, the guys head to Roger's analogue laboratory.

programme.title: E16 - Escaping Devil's Island
programme.desc: Rene Belbenoit, a petty thief, is captured and sent to France's notorious penal colony in French Guiana. He determines to escape or die trying. His story becomes the basis of several popular movies.

programme.title: E3 - Barbarossa
programme.desc: Operation Barbarossa, Nazi Germany's surprise invasion of the Soviet Union, launches on June 22, 1941. In what is the largest military operation in history, Hitler aims to capture their economic resources.

programme.title: E2 - The Missing Giants
programme.desc: Did a Bermuda Triangle tsunami claim two behemoth ships, or did they fall prey to Nazi U-Boats? The team sets its sights on a famous Bermuda Triangle case: the twin vanishings of two massive cargo ships.

programme.title: E2 - The Big Ten
programme.desc: The Landry's target the legendary beasts of Cow Island. Daniel sets an ambitious goal to catch 10 alligators over 10 feet long. Ashley gambles on a new hunting ground.

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Clubhouse Game Day
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate clubhouse game day with JJ & his friends! The competition heats up as JJ & Wally compete in an adrenaline-pumping go-kart race full of fun tricks & obstacles. Then, it's time for a silly game of hide-and-seek, where Boba finds the most clever hiding places! The games continue with a balloon boat race, a round of Duck Duck Goose & a clean-up dance party after the clubhouse gets messy. It's a day packed with fun & friendly competition!

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E1 - Taking on the Baddest Baddies in Town!
programme.desc: It's up to Mila & Morphle to take on the baddest baddies in town! The trouble begins when the Bandits use robot versions of Mila & Morphle to cause chaos. Then, the friends discover a Mirror World where they meet Orphle, Morphle's naughty reflection. When Orphle escapes & causes trouble, they have to stop him! The action continues as the Bandits use a zapper to turn animals into giants & team up with Orphle to escape from jail!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E6 - Comedy Station - Producer Champaklal
programme.desc: Series of short, comedic vignettes where an unlucky Bhojpuri producer Champaklal and his secretary Suzie hilariously navigate chaotic, low-budget filmmaking, trying to outsmart each other

programme.title: Dil Hai Ke Manta Nahi
programme.desc: Pooja runs away from home to be with her boyfriend. On her way, she meets Raghu, who agrees to escort her to her destination, and falls in love with him.

programme.title: Nehlle Pe Dehlla
programme.desc: Two small-time crooks, Jimmy and Johny, blackmail hotel manager Balram Sahni aka Ballu in order to get a huge sum of money. But their plan goes haywire when Ballu is mysteriously murdered.

programme.title: Dil Hai Ke Manta Nahi

programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families.
